title: Better EIP Reviews with Jochem Brouwer | Devconnect Special | ECH Institute
description:
In this conversation, Jochem from the Ethereum Foundation discusses his role in the Ethereum community, emphasizing the importance of feedback in the Ethereum Improvement Proposal (EIP) process. He shares insights on the upcoming Fusaka upgrade, addressing concerns about specific EIPs and the need for better communication and feedback mechanisms. Jochem also provides valuable advice for those submitting EIPs, highlighting the necessity for clarity and thoroughness in proposals.
